rootCause: The remote completionist QA runner assumed the Playwright CLI always existed at frontend/node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js. That hard-coded relative path worked in local layouts but failed when dependencies were hoisted to the workspace root, and no deterministic script-level regression test validated resolver behavior across both install topologies.
resolution: Resolved @playwright/test/cli with require.resolve using frontend and repo-root search paths, added targeted resolver regression coverage, and introduced a repo-level npm script reachability test that validates documented/CI-invoked npm scripts are defined and statically sanity-checks nested script entrypoints.
